title: THOUGHT payload
description: Compressed, periodic snapshot of the agent's reasoning. Streamed at a throttled rate (default: every 2 seconds or every 500 tokens of internal reasoning, whichever is sooner). High volume — by default routed only to the coordinator and the L3 semantic router.

summary.description: Compressed natural-language summary of what the agent is currently reasoning about.

raw_excerpt.description: Optional. A short verbatim excerpt of the reasoning. Useful for debugging; usually omitted in production.

topics.description: Topic tags for routing (e.g., 'auth', 'db.schema'). Used by L1 router.

confidence.description: Optional. Agent's self-rated confidence in its current direction.
